g.title: Slot available for reuse fd = -1 n_in_flight = 0
Connection established TCP_NODELAY set Ready for I/O
IORING_OP_RECV submitted IOSQE_BUFFER_SELECT set Awaiting data
IORING_OP_SEND submitted Echo in progress Buffer owned
IORING_OP_ASYNC_CANCEL submitted Waiting for in-flight ops cancel_requested = true
fd closed (fd = -1) Awaiting cleanup Will return to FREE
Error occurred ECONNRESET, EPIPE, EBADF Initiating cleanup

div.p: Connection ID ≠ File Descriptor The connection table is indexed by conn_id, not fd. This prevents use-after-free bugs when:

ol.li: Connection B opens, gets same fd
Late CQE for Connection A arrives
CQE lookup finds conn_id slot is CLOSED
CQE safely ignored → no corruption Safe fd Reuse: Only close fd after n_in_flight reaches 0.
